title: Tick Control in Dobbs Ferry, NY | $125 - $325 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Dobbs Ferry, NY. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases. Price: $125 - $325. Same-day service available. Call now!
intro: Dobbs Ferry's wooded neighborhoods and proximity to the Hudson River create ideal conditions for tick populations to thrive. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive tick control services to protect Dobbs Ferry residents and their pets from Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses. Our effective treatments target ticks in yards, gardens, and surrounding properties throughout the village.
whyUs: With extensive experience serving Westchester County communities, Best Pest Control NYC understands the unique tick challenges facing Dobbs Ferry properties. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved treatments that are safe for families and pets while providing long-lasting protection against deer ticks, dog ticks, and other species common to the area.
localContext: From the historic homes near the waterfront to the residential neighborhoods along Ashford Avenue and surrounding the Mercy College campus, Dobbs Ferry's tree-lined streets and lush landscaping provide abundant tick habitat. Properties near the Old Croton Aqueduct Trail and the wooded areas throughout the village require particular attention during peak tick season.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Dobbs Ferry?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Dobbs Ferry typically runs from April through November, with peak activity in May, June, and July. However, mild winters can result in tick activity year-round. We recommend beginning preventative treatments in early spring before tick populations peak and continuing protection through fall.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Dobbs Ferry?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in Dobbs Ferry range from $125 to $325 depending on property size, level of infestation, and treatment frequency. We offer single applications as well as seasonal programs with multiple treatments for comprehensive protection. Free estimates are available for all Dobbs Ferry properties.

faqs.question: Are tick treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-registered products that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We recommend keeping children and pets inside during application and until the treatment has dried, typically 2-3 hours. All our technicians are trained in proper application methods to ensure maximum safety and effectiveness.

faqs.question: How often should I treat my Dobbs Ferry property for ticks?
faqs.answer: For optimal protection, we recommend treating your Dobbs Ferry property every 4-6 weeks during tick season. Most homeowners benefit from a seasonal program with 4-5 applications from spring through fall. Properties adjacent to wooded areas or the Old Croton Aqueduct Trail may require more frequent treatments due to higher tick pressure.
